title: Restrained
excerpt: A restrained creature's speed becomes 0. Attack rolls against it have Advantage, its attack rolls have Disadvantage, and it has Disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws.
markdown:
# Restrained

While you have the Restrained condition, you experience the following effects:

*   **Speed 0.** Your [[speed]] is 0 and can't increase.
*   **Attacks Affected.** [[attack_roll|Attack rolls]] against you have [[advantage]], and your [[attack_roll|attack rolls]] have [[advantage_disadvantage|Disadvantage]].
*   **Saving Throws Affected.** You have [[advantage_disadvantage|Disadvantage]] on Dexterity saving throws.
